title: Watchbeast
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ceasar.jpg|thumb|250px|The Watchbeast [[Ceasar]] on the planet [[Patch-4]].]]

'''Watchbeasts''' were immense [[Worm/Legends|worm]]-like creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]]. They possessed vestigial [[Limb/Legends|legs]] that aided them in the purposes of burrowing, and two large pincers that grew from above their brow.

A weapons merchant named [[Orion Ferret]] once acquired a Watchbeast, which he named [[Ceasar]]. He was able to successfully domesticate Ceasar by way of a [[sonic pacifier]]. Some [[Time/Legends|time]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Orion deposited the Watchbeast on the garbage world of [[Patch-4]]. Orion used the wastelands of the planet for the purpose of concealing valuables and realized that the Watchbeast would make an adequate guardian to prevent [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]] from uncovering his wares.

Shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] purchased four [[Black market/Legends|black market]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] from Orion and arrived on Patch-4 to pick them up. But to their surprise the Watchbeast, Ceasar, rose up from beneath the ground and attacked them. Luckily, Luke learned about Ferret's sonic pacifier and retrieved it from their borrowed [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttlecraft]]. He was able to use it to put Ceasar to [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]].
